gt_sql: SELECT T1.Diagnosis FROM Examination AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TG < 200 ORDER BY T2.TG DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT p.Diagnosis 
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.TG IS NOT NULL AND l.TG < 200
ORDER BY l.TG DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: What is the disease name of the patient who has the highest level of triglyceride within the normal range?
